problem: Auto-expand exited 1 even when all substeps reported passed
root_cause: runNpmScript threw on non-zero exit from validation/check scripts, triggering catch block that added to lifecycle.failures and set exitCode 1
fix: Added runNpmScriptSoft() variant that records non-zero exit as warnings instead of throwing
Changed jobs:validate call to use runNpmScriptSoft()
Changed jobs:check-blocked-sources call to use runNpmScriptSoft()
Added exit_code_reason to auto-expand lifecycle output for debugging
process.exitCode = 1 only when lifecycle.failures contains hard failures (not warnings)
